name: large_payload
description: Large payloads to validate the implicit m_bulkDataSize=10MB limit (manager-side bulk indexer cap).
notes: Payload is inflated via load.payload_size_bytes (the value of file.path is extended; wazuh-states-fim-files has dynamic:strict so a new top-level field would be rejected with HTTP 400).

Hard ceiling on payload_size_bytes: remoted's uncompress buffer is OS_MAXSTR=65536 bytes (shared/include/defs.h:51). Going above ~50 KB triggers WARNING (2202) 'Error uncompressing string' and the manager closes the connection before the message reaches m_workersQueue. 32 KB leaves headroom for FB overhead and the event prefix.
To reach m_bulkDataSize=10MB on the indexer side, accumulate volume via data_size + agents (this scenario: 30×100=3000 DataValues × 32 KB = ~96 MB total per window), not via per-message size.
Expect end_ack_error if the indexer HTTP response returns 413.
